source_name: Code4rena Blend V2 Audit + Certora Formal Verification Findings and Analysis Report (2025-02)
finding_title: Missing reserve interest accrual prior to backstop take rate update leads to incorrect  backstop_credit  computation
summary: Blend V2 的 Soroban/Rust C4 报告收录该问题：Missing reserve interest accrual prior to backstop take rate update leads to incorrect  backstop_credit  computation。该样本用于 Stellar Rust 审计时召回相似的授权、状态更新、整数数学、拍卖、奖励和金库会计缺陷。
root_cause: backstop take-rate update computes credit from stale reserve state because reserve interest is not accrued before changing the rate
broken_invariants: rate/config changes that depend on reserve balances must accrue interest first
backstop credit must be computed against current reserve state, not stale indexes
attack_preconditions: 攻击者或普通用户能够调用相关公开 Soroban 合约 entrypoint
相关池、backstop、auction 或 reward-zone 状态达到报告描述的边界条件
attacker_capability: external Soroban contract user able to submit transactions and choose action parameters or operation ordering
trigger_actions: 构造报告描述的函数调用序列或边界状态
观察授权绕过、会计偏移、奖励归属错误、DoS 或资金转移异常

impact.description: Missing reserve interest accrual prior to backstop take rate update leads to incorrect  backstop_credit  computation

why_not_higher: 保留 Code4rena final report 的严重性分级；具体项目中需按可盗金额、可达性和协议影响重新判断。
why_not_lower: final report 中作为 High/Medium 收录，且有具体 Soroban/Rust affected code links 与缓解记录。
common_false_positive_angles: 确认当前代码是否仍在 audited commit 或相同逻辑版本
确认 require_auth / pool status / reserve uniqueness / accrual update 是否已在所有等价入口执行
确认攻击者能否达到边界状态，而不是只有 admin 或测试配置可触发
mitigations: 在所有价值转移入口统一执行授权、状态检查和结算前置更新；对 Soroban Vec/Map 输入做唯一性与边界检查；对整数数学添加低分母/精度回归测试。
